ranked_movies.title: Sneakers
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed and highly praised in its dedicated thread for its clever plot, stellar cast, realistic hacking depiction, and enduring charm as a 90s tech-thriller.

ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned by the AMA guests (Colin Minihan directed it) and praised by commenters as a cult horror success.

ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted in the AMA and praised by commenters for its thriller elements and impactful ending.
